caveat: This framework content pack is a structured starter representation and does not constitute legal advice or complete regulatory coverage. This is a starter content pack for scoping purposes only. It does not constitute legal advice or a complete compliance determination.

obligations.title: Define ISMS leadership commitment
obligations.description: Top management shall demonstrate commitment to the ISMS and align objectives with business direction.
obligations.applicability_notes: Applies to all certified scope entities.

obligations.title: Establish information security policy
obligations.description: Publish and maintain an information security policy communicated across the organization.
obligations.applicability_notes: Policy should be approved and periodically reviewed.

obligations.title: Define ISMS scope and risk criteria
obligations.description: Define ISMS boundaries and criteria for information security risk assessment and treatment.
obligations.applicability_notes: Scope should cover people, process, and technology boundaries.

obligations.title: Perform periodic risk assessments
obligations.description: Assess information security risks and maintain treatment plans with accepted residual risk rationale.
obligations.applicability_notes: Should be updated for major organizational and technical changes.

obligations.title: Maintain competence and awareness
obligations.description: Ensure personnel competence, awareness, and training relevant to information security responsibilities.
obligations.applicability_notes: Evidence may include training logs and role-based curricula.

obligations.title: Control documented information
obligations.description: Create, update, and protect documented ISMS information with revision and retention control.
obligations.applicability_notes: Applies to policies, procedures, and records.

obligations.title: Operate risk treatment controls
obligations.description: Implement and operate controls selected through risk treatment and track operational effectiveness.
obligations.applicability_notes: Traceability to statement of applicability is recommended.

obligations.title: Conduct internal ISMS audits
obligations.description: Perform planned internal audits to determine conformity and effectiveness of the ISMS.
obligations.applicability_notes: Audit scope and criteria should be documented.

obligations.title: Manage nonconformities and corrective actions
obligations.description: Record ISMS nonconformities, perform root-cause analysis, and implement corrective actions.
obligations.applicability_notes: Corrective actions should be tracked to completion.

obligations.title: Implement access control and incident management controls
obligations.description: Deploy Annex A controls for access management, logging, and security incident handling.
obligations.applicability_notes: Includes identity lifecycle and incident response procedures.

content_versions.obligation_text: Demonstrate top management commitment for ISMS effectiveness.
Maintain and communicate an approved information security policy.
Define ISMS scope and criteria for information security risk assessment.
Conduct periodic risk assessments and document treatment decisions.
Ensure personnel competence and awareness for ISMS responsibilities.
Control documented ISMS information lifecycle and accessibility.
Implement and operate controls selected through risk treatment.
Perform internal audits on planned intervals for ISMS conformance.
Address ISMS nonconformities and corrective actions.
Apply Annex A controls for access management and incident response.
